title: Torch Remover
description: Mod that makes your torches to disappear
body:
## Torch Remover
Mod that makes your torches to disappear. This mod is like an addition to other scary and horror mods. 

### For Beta/Alpha Version
How to enable/use this mod:
1) After joining into your world, always write the command /torchRemover <Player or Players> to enable the mod.
2) You can change the number of ticks after the torches start to disappear /torchChangeTime <ticks>
